title: View Dashboard information without being a member of the board
excerpt: Hello - I want to share the information on a Dashboard with clients who are not a member of the boards I am pulling the information from. I know as of right now that is not a feature of Dashboards but would like to put i…

posts.author: lizcrow (Liz Crow)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello - I want to share the information on a Dashboard with clients who are not a member of the boards I am pulling the information from. I know as of right now that is not a feature of Dashboards but would like to put in a request for the future.

Thank you!

Liz

posts.author: steven.dusing (Steven Dusing)
posts.cookedHtml: Seems the same as Sharing dashboards without sharing connected boards
